title: Neon Wilderland Side Quest Frames
note: Short reconverging DtFrame-compatible chains. Terminal nodes omit next for Side quest complete → return to march. Ids: dt-sq-NN-###. Adult dark pulp voice; unique loud/quiet paths per quest.

frames.title: Tithe of Humming Sap
frames.body: Green neon drips from the canopy into black mud. Somewhere in the roots, something counts heartbeats the way a Dominion clerk counts SKUs.

frames.title: Tithe of Humming Sap: The Ask
frames.body: A dryad of fiber and sap peels out of a trunk, palm open. Tithe: three drops of brother-blood — or the chrome knife on your belt, warm from your grip.

choices.label: Refuse with chrome
choices.approach: Cut the bargain open. Let the woods learn what blank-faced men do when billed.

choices.label: Pay in brother-blood
choices.approach: Bleed for a ford that wasn't there. Debt is cheaper than drowning.

frames.title: Tithe of Humming Sap: Loud Path
frames.body: Steel answers first. The tree-line coughs up a whip-hand leftover fat on neon sap — knuckles sticky with code-light.

frames.title: Tithe of Humming Sap: Quiet Path
frames.body: You cut a palm. The dryad tastes the air, not the blood, and paints a ford across black water with one glowing fingertip.

choices.label: Walk the glowing ford
choices.approach: Take the path. Let the debt log itself somewhere older than Helix.

choices.label: Renege mid-hum
choices.approach: Smile like a customer — then make the spirit bleed light.

frames.title: Tithe of Humming Sap: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: You try to pocket the ford and keep the blood. The dryad's hum becomes a scream with teeth. Something human-shaped and wrong steps out of the bark.

frames.title: Tithe of Humming Sap: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Sap cools in your pack, humming whenever a true name brushes the air. The pin goes cold. The east road waits. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak
frames.body: Fresh dirt under a fiber-vine oak. Someone buried inventory and forgot the oldest scav law: witnesses are a shipping cost.

frames.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak: The Ask
frames.body: A crew rings the dig with plasma tips. They smile like partners. They stand like a firing squad that learned manners.

choices.label: Claim the crate with fists
choices.approach: Shovels become knives. First man to the lid owns the night.

choices.label: Buy first pick with stims
choices.approach: Trade a strip for the top blade. Pretend thieves honor receipts.

frames.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak: Loud Path
frames.body: Dirt flies. A coffle-shade — leftover whip-hand energy wearing a scav's coat — decides the crate has one owner.

frames.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak: Quiet Path
frames.body: You slide them a stim strip. They grin like men planning a second tax at the tree line.

choices.label: Take the blade and walk
choices.approach: Leave before their math changes. Chrome in hand beats chrome in a grave.

choices.label: Cut their second tax short
choices.approach: Handshake, then steel — before they invent a late fee.

frames.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: A hand goes for your pack mid-shake. Quiet dies on schedule. The shade that was waiting in the roots wakes hungry.

frames.title: Knives Under the Fiber Oak: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: One chrome blade fits your palm like it was cast from an old callsign. The rest of the crate can feed the worms. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade
frames.body: Wake-glade dirt still smells like ozone and birthdays you cannot prove. The Rememberer sits, staring at empty air like it's a door.

frames.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade: The Ask
frames.body: A whisper without a mouth: one syllable of a true name. Price — dreamless sleep tonight — or steel against the shade that hoards the rest.

choices.label: Spit on the syllable
choices.approach: Names are Dominion bait. Fight the shade that wears your face wrong.

choices.label: Swallow the syllable
choices.approach: Let it burn under the tongue. Risk hunters for a scrap of self.

frames.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade: Loud Path
frames.body: You refuse. The shade steps out of heat-haze wearing your jawline and someone else's smile — a dust-trail warg of spirit and spite.

frames.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade: Quiet Path
frames.body: The syllable lands under your tongue like a SKU waiting to hatch. Your brothers look at you like the air changed.

choices.label: Keep it secret
choices.approach: Do not say it drunk. Do not say it near drones. March with a live wire in your mouth.

choices.label: Deny the second fee
choices.approach: It wants the dog's name next. Chrome answers that invoice.

frames.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The whisper upsells: the Rememberer's true name. You answer with a blade. The warg-shade answers with teeth.

frames.title: Syllable in the Wipe-Glade: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: A scar itches when drones skim the canopy. One syllable lives in your mouth — a match you haven't struck. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax
frames.body: Dust-runners with barcode freckles hawk forget-patches off a busted drone sled. Their eyes are too steady for the product they sell.

frames.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax: The Ask
frames.body: Buy a patch that sandblasts memory, smash the sled for the stash, or make them name who taught trail rats Project Pale slang.

choices.label: Kick the sled over
choices.approach: Break the supply line. See what stands up wearing a dealer's coat.

choices.label: Buy one dirty strip
choices.approach: Pay coin. Watch the dog decide if you still smell like pack.

frames.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax: Loud Path
frames.body: The sled flips. A camp-thief gremlin in a runner's coat unfolds adult knuckles and a smile full of chrome caps.

frames.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax: Quiet Path
frames.body: You slap the patch on. The Rememberer growls at your cheek like you just became a stranger wearing his brother's skin.

choices.label: Ride the half-wipe
choices.approach: Keep the strip. Clarity on demand. Relapse on layaway.

choices.label: End the upsell
choices.approach: They pitch wipe-lite next. You pitch a boot through the sales pitch.

frames.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Wipe-lite means full blank if you're lucky, Helix recall if you're not. You cancel the product demo the hard way.

frames.title: Forget-Patch Road Tax: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Half-spent strip ticks in your pocket like a second pulse. Useful. Filthy. Do not stack with conscience. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces
frames.body: Widowmere holds your reflection like a product photo. The eyes in the water blink first — and they are not yours.

frames.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces: The Ask
frames.body: Drink the false face, smash the mirror-calm with chrome, or let the dog decide which reflection is prey.

choices.label: Cut the surface open
choices.approach: Blade the calm. Kill whatever climbs out wearing your overtime.

choices.label: Drink a stranger's face
choices.approach: Sip the coolant ghost. Taste a life that almost fits.

frames.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces: Loud Path
frames.body: Steel breaks the glaze. An ash-wisp stalker climbs out dripping wet iron and other men's eyes.

frames.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces: Quiet Path
frames.body: You drink. Taste: someone else's overtime, a warrant nail, a name that almost seats in your skull.

choices.label: Keep the stolen taste
choices.approach: Walk away knowing one face in the water was almost you.

choices.label: Refuse the second sip
choices.approach: The lake wants brother-blood next. Offer chrome instead.

frames.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Widowmere upsells: three more mouths, three more debts. You answer with a fight the mist didn't budget for.

frames.title: Widowmere's Stolen Faces: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Coolant shard fogs when you lie to the pack. Useful. Insulting. Keep it close. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Nursery of Property
frames.body: Saplings stand in rows like a nursery for property. Each trunk already wears a barcode scar — pre-branded wilderness.

frames.title: Nursery of Property: The Ask
frames.body: Burn the row, peel evidence for freeholds, or wait for the planter who treats living woods like a stockroom.

choices.label: Torch the inventory
choices.approach: Fire the SKU trees. Make Helix count ash instead of timber.

choices.label: Peel a barcode strip
choices.approach: Steal a receipt from a forest. Proof that Dominion plants property.

frames.title: Nursery of Property: Loud Path
frames.body: Flames take. A trail-webling fat on neon resin drops from the canopy — Helix's living security sticker.

frames.title: Nursery of Property: Quiet Path
frames.body: You peel bark. Trees bleed green light and scream like radios stuck between stations.

choices.label: Smuggle the peel east
choices.approach: Evidence walks better than sermons. Freeholds pay for receipts.

choices.label: Kill the buyer early
choices.approach: A scav offers coin, then decides murder is cheaper accounting.

frames.title: Nursery of Property: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The dealer's smile cracks. The webling in the rows was always the real cashier.

frames.title: Nursery of Property: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Dead product code on bark. Someone catalogued a forest. You stole the invoice. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers
frames.body: The dog digs like the dirt owes him rent. Chrome jawbone. Fresh. Never buried by weather — buried by someone who expected to come back.

frames.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers: The Ask
frames.body: Keep the bone, rebury it with respect, or follow the scent trail that smells like your own sweat from a life you don't own.

choices.label: Keep it — dare the owner
choices.approach: Pack trophy. If the rest of the body wants it, meet it standing.

choices.label: Reroute the scent trail
choices.approach: Bury it wrong. Follow the smell that shouldn't know your name.

frames.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers: Loud Path
frames.body: Owner arrives on bad intentions — a whip-hand thug with chrome in his gums and a leash that used to meter dogs for Helix.

frames.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers: Quiet Path
frames.body: You rebury with respect. The ground spits the bone back like a rejected contract. The scent trail sharpens.

choices.label: Wear the tooth
choices.approach: Wire it to your neck. Let the dog approve. Feel watched.

choices.label: Stop the grave-thief
choices.approach: A camp rat pockets the jaw mid-prayer. Prayer ends. Fists begin.

frames.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Quiet burial becomes a mugging. The thug who buried the rest of the chrome body wants a matching set.

frames.title: Chrome Jaw the Dog Remembers: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Chrome canine on wire. The Rememberer approves. Your neck feels like inventory. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood
frames.body: Fiber-optic hair hangs from a willow that should not grow this far west. It speaks in modem-hiss braided with old spirit-speech.

frames.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood: The Ask
frames.body: Safe ford for brother-blood — or force the crossing and learn why Palefen keeps bodies as buoys.

choices.label: Force the black water
choices.approach: No tithe. Boots in the current. Kill whatever runs the toll booth.

choices.label: Bleed for the glass ford
choices.approach: Three drops. Three brothers. Walk on light that wasn't there.

frames.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood: Loud Path
frames.body: You take the ford by force. A coffle-shade rises from the silt — mist shaped like cages, teeth shaped like locks.

frames.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood: Quiet Path
frames.body: Three drops. The ford hardens like smoked glass under boot. Somewhere, a ledger older than Helix ticks once.

choices.label: Cross and owe the woods
choices.approach: Take the token. One trail lie forgiven — until it isn't.

choices.label: Steal the ford mid-hum
choices.approach: Try to keep blood and path. Spirits invoice late fees in teeth.

frames.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: You pocket the light-path and wipe the blood away. The dryad's hair becomes cable. The shade in the silt clocks in early.

frames.title: Ford Bought in Brother-Blood: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Spirit-favor token cools against your ribs. One lie on the trail just got cheaper. The next one won't. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Mist That Remembers Cages
frames.body: Night mist on the Stim Dust Marches knits itself into cage bars. You can walk around — or walk through a history that refuses to stay unpaid.

frames.title: Mist That Remembers Cages: The Ask
frames.body: Cut through the mist-cages, circle for hours, or listen when the fog starts whispering warrant numbers.

choices.label: Walk straight through the bars
choices.approach: Memory with teeth meets chrome with brothers. No detours.

choices.label: Listen for the warrant numbers
choices.approach: Let the mist confess. Steal a number Helix still uses.

frames.title: Mist That Remembers Cages: Loud Path
frames.body: Bars become jaws. A dust-trail warg of cold iron and leftover screams takes the first swing.

frames.title: Mist That Remembers Cages: Quiet Path
frames.body: The mist recites SKUs like a prayer. One number matches the itch under your own skin.

choices.label: Pocket the cold iron
choices.approach: Take the flake. Cool the rage — for an hour. Then it comes back louder.

choices.label: Break the mist's mouth
choices.approach: It asks for a brother's name as toll. You answer with violence.

frames.title: Mist That Remembers Cages: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The fog wants a true name to finish the cage. You give it a fight instead — and the warg steps fully into the world.

frames.title: Mist That Remembers Cages: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Cold iron flake against the pulse. Rage goes quiet for one hour. After that, it owes interest. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Become Helix Inventory
frames.body: Fiber-vines drop from the canopy like fishing lines cast by a bored god. The hooks are SKU tags. The bait is you.

frames.title: Become Helix Inventory: The Ask
frames.body: Cut free loud, slip the snare quiet, or let them tag you and reverse-engineer the scanner.

choices.label: Hack the vines apart
choices.approach: Chrome vs living cable. Become inventory's worst customer.

choices.label: Slip the snare and steal coil
choices.approach: Become rope. Steal their trap. Leave a fake tag humming in the dirt.

frames.title: Become Helix Inventory: Loud Path
frames.body: Vines scream like cut power lines. A camp-thief gremlin rides the cable down — Helix's freelance inventory clerk.

frames.title: Become Helix Inventory: Quiet Path
frames.body: You slip free with a coil on your shoulder. The fake tag you leave starts pinging like a wounded drone.

choices.label: Keep the garrote-rope
choices.approach: Coil for climbing or killing. Same tool, different honesty.

choices.label: Ambush the recall crew
choices.approach: They come to collect tagged meat. You collect them instead.

frames.title: Become Helix Inventory: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Recall pack arrives early — gremlin first, drones later. Quiet theft becomes a product recall with blood.

frames.title: Become Helix Inventory: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Fiber-vine coil in the pack: rope, garrote, or leash for something uglier than a dog. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces
frames.body: SKU Trace night market: warrant-nails on velvet, data-spikes humming like wasps. The auctioneer points at your blank faces like they already sold.

frames.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces: The Ask
frames.body: Bid with fists, buy a bent nail with dirty coin, or crash the lot before someone tags you as sold.

choices.label: Crash the auction
choices.approach: Flip the table. Make the hunters bid with blood.

choices.label: Buy the bent nail
choices.approach: Pay. Walk. Pretend property can purchase its own lockpick.

frames.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces: Loud Path
frames.body: Tables flip. A bridge-brute in hunter chrome decides the lot closes early — on your skull.

frames.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces: Quiet Path
frames.body: Coin changes hands. The nail is warm, like it remembers being driven into someone who had a name.

choices.label: Pocket the spoof
choices.approach: One soft scan dies tonight. After that, you're meat again.

choices.label: Steal the spike rack
choices.approach: Smile at the receipt. Then rob the whole warrant board.

frames.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: They notice the smile is fake. The brute was always the house's favorite closer.

frames.title: Tonight's Lot: Blank Faces: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Bent warrant nail cools in your fist. One low-tier scan just got confused. Enjoy the glitch. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Who Owns the Nameless
frames.body: Two crews square off on SKU Trace asphalt: Red Maw vs Thorn. Argument topic — who owns men with no names. You are the slideshow.

frames.title: Who Owns the Nameless: The Ask
frames.body: Pick a side and fight, vanish while they bleed each other, or make both crews bid on a lie.

choices.label: Make them fight you instead
choices.approach: Become the argument. End both claims with chrome.

choices.label: Sell them a false trail
choices.approach: Auction a fake sighting east. Walk west while they chase ghosts.

frames.title: Who Owns the Nameless: Loud Path
frames.body: A thorn-clan skirmisher steps out as champion. The badge on his chest already has your silhouette stamped in.

frames.title: Who Owns the Nameless: Quiet Path
frames.body: You sell a lie with a map drawn in stim dust. Both crews buy it. Pride is a hell of a drug.

choices.label: Leave while they chase east
choices.approach: Ghost the Trace. Keep the melted badge as a joke that isn't funny.

choices.label: Rob the winner's purse
choices.approach: When one crew drops, tax the corpse before the other finishes celebrating.

frames.title: Who Owns the Nameless: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The lie expires early. Skirmisher finds you mid-theft with a plasma tip and a personal grievance.

frames.title: Who Owns the Nameless: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Hunter badge melted into scrap. Proof that ownership can be heated until it forgets your face. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Sip Someone Else's Code
frames.body: Palefen Reservoir glows the color of a server room drowning. The surface flickers with faces mid-download.

frames.title: Sip Someone Else's Code: The Ask
frames.body: Drink, smash the intake pipe feeding Helix stills, or bargain with the thirsty dead who already drank too deep.

choices.label: Smash the Helix intake
choices.approach: Break the siphon. Make Dominion choke on dry pipes.

choices.label: Drink the stolen code
choices.approach: Sip. Taste overtime, wetwork, a callsign that almost seats.

frames.title: Sip Someone Else's Code: Loud Path
frames.body: Pipe screams. An ash-cloak outrider — coolant-runner with a Dominion leash — arrives to protect the flow.

frames.title: Sip Someone Else's Code: Quiet Path
frames.body: You drink. Code blooms behind the eyes: a briefing room, three tables, a dog barking at a door that shouldn't exist.

choices.label: Keep the flask filled
choices.approach: Steady the shakes. Accept that some memories aren't yours and still hurt.

choices.label: Spit the code back as a weapon
choices.approach: Refuse the second swallow. Fight the dead who wanted you as a cup.

frames.title: Sip Someone Else's Code: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The thirsty dead climb the bank when you spit. The outrider was always their day-shift manager.

frames.title: Sip Someone Else's Code: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Coolant flask ticks against your hip. Stim shakes quiet. Dreams get louder. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline
frames.body: Thornspine wind smells like ozone and old warrants. Silhouettes on the ridge already have crossbows leveled at your lack of a name.

frames.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline: The Ask
frames.body: Charge the ridge, ghost the switchback, or fake a Helix recall ping and watch them scatter.

choices.label: Charge the plasma line
choices.approach: Uphill into tips. Make the argument personal and short.

choices.label: Fake a Dominion recall
choices.approach: Spoof a ping. Let hunters fear their employer more than you.

frames.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline: Loud Path
frames.body: Plasma tips bloom. A pale-host scout drops from a pine like a product recall with legs.

frames.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline: Quiet Path
frames.body: Your fake ping lights their badges. Half the ridge scatters. The half that stays is worse.

choices.label: Loot the abandoned tip
choices.approach: One bolt left. Spend it like a confession.

choices.label: Turn the scout's own tip
choices.approach: Quiet ends when he smells the spoof. Make the plasma change employers.

frames.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The scout sniffs the lie. Plasma finds a new argument — your chest — until you rewrite the terms.

frames.title: Plasma Tips on the Ridgeline: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: One plasma tip, one shot, no refunds. The ridge forgets your faces for now. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Confession for Ampules
frames.body: Den light is a purple bruise. The priest wears a collar that used to meter spirits; now it meters sins and sells the readings.

frames.title: Confession for Ampules: The Ask
frames.body: Confess a lie for an ampule, rob the altar, or make him admit who taught a trail priest Pale liturgy.

choices.label: Rob the altar blind
choices.approach: Smash the shrine. Steal the ampules. Kill the usher.

choices.label: Confess a beautiful lie
choices.approach: Feed him fiction. Fish a real Pale phrase out of his mouth.

frames.title: Confession for Ampules: Loud Path
frames.body: Altar tips. A red-maw hunter was the usher — and the collection plate has teeth.

frames.title: Confession for Ampules: Quiet Path
frames.body: You confess a fake sin. He answers with a real Project Pale phrase. Skin crawls like a barcode hatching.

choices.label: Take PALE-LITE and leave
choices.approach: Walk out doped on illegal clarity. Don't stack it with honesty.

choices.label: Refuse the name-tithe
choices.approach: He wants a brother's true name for the good stuff. Offer violence.

frames.title: Confession for Ampules: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Name-tithe becomes a fight. The hunter-usher was always the real sacrament.

frames.title: Confession for Ampules: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: PALE-LITE ampule. Illegal as hell. Effective as a second chance you didn't earn. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight
frames.body: Chromeveil River runs like liquid neon under a tarp of fog. The skipper's barge hums — not engines. Something in the crates is praying.

frames.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight: The Ask
frames.body: Guard the freight loud, smuggle quiet past the freehold watch, or crack a crate and see what Helix cages for later.

choices.label: Guard the crates with chrome
choices.approach: Be the wall. Kill anything that sniffs the prayer.

choices.label: Ghost the freehold watch
choices.approach: Mute muscle means mute footsteps. Coin without a body count — maybe.

frames.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight: Loud Path
frames.body: River fog births a grave-mist hound — spirit cargo's immune system with jaws.

frames.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight: Quiet Path
frames.body: You slip past the watch. One crate lid is loose. Inside: a jarred whisper wearing a human vowel.

choices.label: Deliver and take chemical coin
choices.approach: Get paid. Live with the jar's empty echo in your pack.

choices.label: Crack the spirit cage
choices.approach: Free what's inside. Fight what the skipper hired you to keep sealed.

frames.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: The whisper exits angry. The hound was the jar's parole officer.

frames.title: Mute Muscle for Spirit Freight: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Chemical coin in one pocket. Empty spirit jar in the other, still humming like guilt with good acoustics. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs
frames.body: SKU Trace alley plastered with leaflets: THE DRAGON REMEMBERS / BARCODES BURN. Ink smells like ozone and old blood.

frames.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs: The Ask
frames.body: Join the blood rite, steal the pamphlet stash, or bait Helix into raiding the cult for you.

choices.label: Crash the blood rite
choices.approach: Kick in the cellar door. Meet the dragon's middle management.

choices.label: Steal the glowing ink maps
choices.approach: Lift pamphlets. Learn where they claim the dragon nests — without kneeling.

frames.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs: Loud Path
frames.body: Cellar opens on a bridge-brute painted in ash runes. The 'dragon' tonight is knuckles and a branding iron.

frames.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs: Quiet Path
frames.body: Ink maps glow under neon: Ash Horizon coordinates, a prayer schedule, a list of SKUs already burned off living skin.

choices.label: Keep the glowing map
choices.approach: Follow later — or sell it to freeholds who hate cults and Helix equally.

choices.label: Burn the cult's ledger
choices.approach: They ask for your barcode as initiation. You initiate a fire.

frames.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Ledger burns. Brute doesn't. The rite becomes a street fight with holy branding tools.

frames.title: Dragon That Burns SKUs: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Pamphlet ink glows when Helix neon passes. Either a map or a lure. Same difference on the ash road. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Blind the Fallen Eye
frames.body: Silverthread Coolant fog, a crashed Helix eye sparking in the needles. Its last recording still loops: your silhouettes, unlabeled.

frames.title: Blind the Fallen Eye: The Ask
frames.body: Smash the eye, salvage the lens quiet, or bait the recall pack into a killbox.

choices.label: Smash the eye mid-loop
choices.approach: End the recording. Fight whatever comes to collect the corpse.

choices.label: Pocket the cracked lens
choices.approach: Salvage before recall. Leave a decoy heat signature humming.

frames.title: Blind the Fallen Eye: Loud Path
frames.body: Glass dies. A thorn-clan skirmisher on Helix contract drops from the fog — recall with a pulse rifle.

frames.title: Blind the Fallen Eye: Quiet Path
frames.body: Lens in the pack. Decoy ping sings. For thirty seconds you are invisible to the wrong god.

choices.label: Keep the heat-ghost glass
choices.approach: Night vision for the haunted. Don't stare too long at your own outline.

choices.label: Ambush the recall
choices.approach: Use the decoy as bait. Harvest the harvesters.

frames.title: Blind the Fallen Eye: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Recall arrives early and angry. Skirmisher first — drones if you linger.

frames.title: Blind the Fallen Eye: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Cracked lens shows heat ghosts after dark: spirits, drones, and sometimes your own old wetwork silhouette. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds
frames.body: Reedfen Marshes: a pit ringed with reed torches and bad teeth. The board prices three silhouettes as one blade. The Rememberer is not listed. Insult.

frames.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds: The Ask
frames.body: Fight the prelim loud, throw a round and rob the cage, or buy the odds board and rewrite your price.

choices.label: Take the prelim bloody
choices.approach: Enter the pit. Teach the marsh what blank-faced men are worth.

choices.label: Buy the bookie's slate
choices.approach: Own the odds. Make the crowd bet against their own eyes.

frames.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds: Loud Path
frames.body: An ash-cloak outrider steps in as house champ — stim-bright eyes, knuckles wrapped in reed fiber and wire.

frames.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds: Quiet Path
frames.body: You buy the slate. The bookie's smile says you just purchased a target painted on your own back.

choices.label: Cash out and walk
choices.approach: Take the wrap. Leave before the main card smells real money.

choices.label: Rob the betting cage
choices.approach: Quiet math ends. Loud theft begins. House muscle objects.

frames.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Cage door, purse, and outrider arrive in the same heartbeat. The marsh wants a show — you give it a war.

frames.title: Bloodsport Under the Reeds: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Knuckle wrap sticky with other men's odds. The crowd learned your silhouettes. So did Helix, probably. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own
frames.body: Chromeveil bank mud. The dog freezes, nose high, then pulls east like the past owes him a body. The scent is yours. The footprints aren't.

frames.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own: The Ask
frames.body: Follow loud into the thicket, ghost the trail quiet, or bait whatever wears your smell into the open.

choices.label: Crash the scent's owner
choices.approach: Follow hard. Kill the impostor wearing your overtime.

choices.label: Shadow the trail silent
choices.approach: Let the dog lead. Learn before you bleed.

frames.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own: Loud Path
frames.body: Thicket opens on a pale-host scout in a coat cut like yours used to be. He smiles with your old muscle memory.

frames.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own: Quiet Path
frames.body: You find a camp: three bedrolls, one dog bowl, a wipe-kit still warm. Someone rehearsed being you.

choices.label: Take the fur sample and go
choices.approach: Pack dogs will treat it as family. Hunters may treat it as bait.

choices.label: Burn the wipe-kit
choices.approach: End the rehearsal. Fight the scout who was learning your face.

frames.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Flame takes the kit. The scout takes offense. Your scent becomes a battlefield.

frames.title: Scent of a Life You Don't Own: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Matted fur in a waterproof fold. The Rememberer sleeps easier. You don't. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate
frames.body: Helix Gate: a neon grin the size of a warehouse. The smile-tax booth accepts coin, DNA, or a reason to open fire.

frames.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate: The Ask
frames.body: Pay the smile, smash the booth, or spoof a smile-chip and walk through like inventory that learned manners.

choices.label: Smash the smile booth
choices.approach: Break the neon teeth. Fight the enforcer behind the grin.

choices.label: Spoof a soft smile-chip
choices.approach: Counterfeit courtesy. Walk like you belong to the machine.

frames.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate: Loud Path
frames.body: Neon dies in sparks. A bond-chain enforcer steps through the smoke — collar meters glowing like a halo for bastards.

frames.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate: Quiet Path
frames.body: Chip accepts. Gate smile softens. For ten steps you are a citizen. Then the meter hiccups.

choices.label: Keep the counterfeit chip
choices.approach: One soft checkpoint. After that, invent a new face.

choices.label: Jack the meter mid-scan
choices.approach: Quiet ends when the chip glitches. Make the glitch a riot.

frames.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Meter screams fraud. Enforcer was never fooled — only bored. Boredom ends.

frames.title: Smile Tax at the Neon Gate: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Counterfeit smile-chip in the pack. One soft gate. Don't grin while you use it. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit
frames.body: Mirehollow Stacks: smokestack stumps and a blacksite door sweating stim runoff. The keypad still asks for a callsign you might have owned.

frames.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit: The Ask
frames.body: Blow the soft lock, slip the waste pipe, or knock polite and kill whoever answers.

choices.label: Blow the soft lock
choices.approach: No manners. Force entry. Survive the alarm's firstborn.

choices.label: Crawl the waste pipe
choices.approach: Soft entry through filth. Steal a card before the cameras wake.

frames.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit: Loud Path
frames.body: Lock dies. A gloomwood spinner drops from the ceiling vents — Helix's eight-legged janitor with a taste for trespassers.

frames.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit: Quiet Path
frames.body: Pipe spit you into a hallway of empty collars. Keycard still warm on a dead tech's chest.

choices.label: Exfil with the warm card
choices.approach: Hard exit. Soft souvenirs. Don't check what the card still opens.

choices.label: Trip the alarm on purpose
choices.approach: Lure security into a kill funnel. Harvest badges.

frames.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Alarm loves company. Spinner first — enforcers if you admire your work too long.

frames.title: Soft Entry, Hard Exit: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Half-burned keycard ticks warm. Somewhere a door still thinks you work here. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap
frames.body: House of Seals collar yard: rings hanging like wind chimes for the owned. One hangs open. The dog won't approach it.

frames.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap: The Ask
frames.body: Take the open collar, smash the meter rack, or wear it long enough to spoof a seal-guard scan.

choices.label: Smash the meter rack
choices.approach: Break the counting machines. Fight what they summon.

choices.label: Borrow the unlocked ring
choices.approach: Wear property for thirty seconds. Steal its lie.

frames.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap: Loud Path
frames.body: Meters die screaming. A pale-ember moth the size of a coat unfolds from the spark — spirit pest Helix never fully stamped out.

frames.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap: Quiet Path
frames.body: Collar clicks shut then open. For a breath you feel the wipe room's hum. Then it lets go — almost kindly.

choices.label: Keep the dead ring
choices.approach: Bluff a seal-guard once. Pray once is enough.

choices.label: Use bait against the trapper
choices.approach: The unlocked collar was a lure. Flip it on the hunter who set it.

frames.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Hunter arrives to collect tagged meat. Moth arrives because violence tastes like nectar. Busy yard.

frames.title: Unlocked Collar, Loaded Trap: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Dead collar ring in the pack. Once, a guard will see property and wave you through. Don't blink. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face
frames.body: House of Seals guest wing: velvet, ozone, and a mirror that doesn't wait for you to look. It already knows your kill-count posture.

frames.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face: The Ask
frames.body: Smash the glass, study the wetwork face, or ask the suite AI who ordered the reflection.

choices.label: Shatter the wetwork face
choices.approach: Refuse the product photo. Kill what climbs out of the shards.

choices.label: Study the man in the glass
choices.approach: Learn the stance. Steal a tell. Risk liking who you were.

frames.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face: Loud Path
frames.body: Glass rains. An iron-cuff overseer steps through the frame like the suite's immune system in a tailored coat.

frames.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face: Quiet Path
frames.body: The face in the glass mouths a callsign. Your throat almost answers. The dog growls at the reflection, not at you.

choices.label: Take a shard and leave
choices.approach: Keep a piece that fogs when you lie to pack. Hate how useful that is.

choices.label: Interrogate the suite AI
choices.approach: It offers the full briefing for a brother's name. Decline with chrome.

frames.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: AI screams a hunter ping. Overseer arrives to collect the product that looked too long.

frames.title: Luxury Glass, Wetwork Face: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Mirror shard clouds when you lie to brothers. Truth serum for people who hate sermons. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks
frames.body: Mirehollow Stacks cough green fog that tastes like burnt contracts. Scav fires and spirit lights argue over the same scrap piles.

frames.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks: The Ask
frames.body: Raid loud for Helix crates, bargain with the fog spirits, or pit scavs against spirits and loot the middle.

choices.label: Kick in the scrap warren
choices.approach: Chrome first. Claim Dominion leftovers by right of violence.

choices.label: Bargain with the green fog
choices.approach: Offer a name you don't need. Take an ampule that blinds cameras.

frames.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks: Loud Path
frames.body: Warren doors open on a citadel-gate brute moonlighting as scrap king. Helix leftovers hire well.

frames.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks: Quiet Path
frames.body: Fog accepts a fake callsign and presses a cold ampule into your palm. Somewhere a true ledger still writes.

choices.label: Pocket the camera-blind
choices.approach: One minute of blindness for the eyes in the walls. Spend it like a prayer.

choices.label: Double-cross the fog
choices.approach: Steal a second ampule. Learn why spirits invoice late.

frames.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Fog turns teeth. Brute was always the fog's union rep.

frames.title: Raid the Smoking Stacks: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Green fog ampule: one minute of camera snow. After that, every lens remembers your outline. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Memo That Tags the Reader
frames.body: Helix Gate dumpster alley: a slate still warm, stamped PALE / INTERNAL. The dog noses it like prey that learned to type.

frames.title: Memo That Tags the Reader: The Ask
frames.body: Read it loud under neon, copy it quiet into a dead chip, or bait the hunter ping into a trap.

choices.label: Read it under neon
choices.approach: Know the cells. Accept the ping. Kill the first hunter it buys.

choices.label: Clone the slate dark
choices.approach: Copy without opening full. Steal three callsigns. Stay half-blind.

frames.title: Memo That Tags the Reader: Loud Path
frames.body: Ping lights. A cold-iron haunt unfolds from a vent — hunter software wearing leftover flesh.

frames.title: Memo That Tags the Reader: Quiet Path
frames.body: Three callsigns copy clean. One of them fits your mouth too well. The dog whines.

choices.label: Keep the fragment
choices.approach: Three maybe-names. Do not speak them near drones.

choices.label: Weaponize the hunter ping
choices.approach: Leave the slate as bait. Ambush what comes reading.

frames.title: Memo That Tags the Reader: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Haunt arrives early, already mid-download of your outline. Quiet cloning becomes loud editing.

frames.title: Memo That Tags the Reader: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Memo fragment: three callsigns under frost. One might be a brother. One might be a trap. Same risk. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Spirits Through the Meter
frames.body: Gate perimeter lab: spirits strained through glass like juice. Techs laugh like men who meter gods for a living.

frames.title: Spirits Through the Meter: The Ask
frames.body: Smash the meters, free a spirit for a favor, or sell the calibration schedule to freehold saboteurs.

choices.label: Smash the calibration rack
choices.approach: Break the glass. Free the scream. Fight the overtime enforcer.

choices.label: Cut a quiet bargain with one spirit
choices.approach: Free one. Take a dial. Owe a woods that remembers invoices.

frames.title: Spirits Through the Meter: Loud Path
frames.body: Glass rains. A bond-chain enforcer clocks in early — collar meters synced to the screaming.

frames.title: Spirits Through the Meter: Quiet Path
frames.body: One spirit slips free, presses a dial into your palm, and vanishes smelling like rain on chrome.

choices.label: Keep the debt dial
choices.approach: Read the air before you lie. Hate how useful that is.

choices.label: Sell the schedule — then burn it
choices.approach: Take freehold coin, torch the lab anyway. Fight whoever objects to the math.

frames.title: Spirits Through the Meter: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Techs call security. Enforcer arrives. The freed spirit watches like a sports fan.

frames.title: Spirits Through the Meter: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Spirit-meter dial ticks when debt hangs in the air — yours, theirs, the woods'. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit
frames.body: Reedfen mist parts on bodies bobbing like invoices. The tattoos match a muscle memory in your arm. The dog's fur stands like wire.

frames.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit: The Ask
frames.body: Burn the bodies, harvest a tattoo scrap, or hunt whatever's collecting pack dogs for Helix.

choices.label: Burn the floating invoices
choices.approach: Fire the marsh. Kill the collector when it shows for the ash.

choices.label: Harvest a tattoo scrap
choices.approach: Proof you were a unit. Proof someone is restocking the set.

frames.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit: Loud Path
frames.body: Flames take. A gloomwood spinner drops from reed canopy — marsh janitor with Helix firmware.

frames.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit: Quiet Path
frames.body: Tattoo scrap peels like a label. Under it: a secondary SKU still humming. The dog won't look at it.

choices.label: Sleeve the scrap and march
choices.approach: Waterproof proof. Heavy as a warrant.

choices.label: Bait the dog-collector
choices.approach: Use the Rememberer as lure — then reverse the trap with chrome.

frames.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Collector takes the bait. Spinner takes the fight. The marsh takes attendance in blood.

frames.title: Corpses Wearing Your Unit: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Unit tattoo scrap sealed tight. You were a product line. Now you're a recall with legs. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen
frames.body: Seal kitchens smell like spice and sedatives. Staff argue with blades over which numbered suite gets the soft meat tonight.

frames.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen: The Ask
frames.body: Join the brawl, steal from the freezer while they bleed, or free the 'special order' locked in the cold room.

choices.label: Join the cleaver brawl
choices.approach: Pick a side mid-swing. Or invent a third side made of brothers.

choices.label: Rob the freezer mid-fight
choices.approach: Let them butcher each other. Steal what Helix calls dinner.

frames.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen: Loud Path
frames.body: Cleavers sing. A pale-ember moth nests in the spice racks — pest with a taste for open wounds.

frames.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen: Quiet Path
frames.body: Freezer opens on stim crates and a sealed guest-tag: PALE CELL / HOLD. Someone's meal has a callsign.

choices.label: Take the cleaver and vanish
choices.approach: Kitchen tool. Weapon. Resume. Same steel.

choices.label: Free the special order
choices.approach: Crack the cold-room lock. Fight kitchen security and the moth it feeds.

frames.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Cold-room alarm. Moth and a sous-chef with Dominion brass knuckles clock in together.

frames.title: Cleavers in the Seal Kitchen: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Bloodied cleaver: cooks, kills, and reminds you the House serves people on both sides of the plate. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink
frames.body: Coldgate Uplink: a mountain notch humming like a throat full of bees. The cable feeds the Gate's smile and every drone that loves it.

frames.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink: The Ask
frames.body: Cut loud with chrome, splice quiet and poison the feed, or bait an overseer into the notch and bury him in static.

choices.label: Cut the uplink cable
choices.approach: Sever the grin. Fight the overtime that comes to splice it.

choices.label: Poison the feed silent
choices.approach: Spliced lie into the stream. Gate smile glitches. Drones dream wrong.

frames.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink: Loud Path
frames.body: Cable sparks. An iron-cuff overseer arrives with a repair kit and a kill order that looks like a work order.

frames.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink: Quiet Path
frames.body: Poison takes. Far below, neon teeth stutter. For a minute the empire looks drunk.

choices.label: Pocket the spare fuse
choices.approach: One swarm-killer. Throw it like a prayer with shrapnel.

choices.label: Collapse the notch on them
choices.approach: Quiet splice becomes loud avalanche. Overseer objects mid-burial.

frames.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Static becomes a fistfight. Overseer's cuff meters redline. The mountain doesn't care who wins.

frames.title: Kill the Gate's Smile Uplink: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Uplink fuse in the pack. One drone swarm away from a blackout smile. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: True Names as Punchlines
frames.body: The Undervault breathes smoke and amp feedback. On stage, a comic reads true names off a slate like punchlines. The laugh track sounds like a collar meter.

frames.title: True Names as Punchlines: The Ask
frames.body: Rush the stage, buy the slate quiet, or heckle until he names the handler who feeds him Pale files.

choices.label: Rush the stage
choices.approach: End the set. Take the slate. Survive the bouncer.

choices.label: Buy the joke slate under the table
choices.approach: Pay in chemical coin. Own the punchlines before they own you.

frames.title: True Names as Punchlines: Loud Path
frames.body: Stage lights die. A warcamp berserker — house bouncer — decides the show must go on over your ribs.

frames.title: True Names as Punchlines: Quiet Path
frames.body: Slate changes hands. Three names glow. None are funny. One might be yours.

choices.label: Keep the fight-tempo string
choices.approach: Tie it on your wrist. Let your pulse learn the pit's time signature.

choices.label: Make him name the handler
choices.approach: Joke's over. Extract the source. Fight whoever protects the supply.

frames.title: True Names as Punchlines: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Handler's name leaves his mouth. Berserker leaves the shadows. The crowd wants a different kind of show.

frames.title: True Names as Punchlines: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Mandolin string hums fight tempo into your pulse. Comedy's over. The pit is warming up. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Odds Board: Three as One
frames.body: Booked. Odds board paints three silhouettes as one price. The Rememberer stares at the blank line where his name should be — then at you, waiting.

frames.title: Odds Board: Three as One: The Ask
frames.body: Fight clean-dirty, throw round two and rob the cage, or demand the dog get odds like a fighter.

choices.label: Take the three-round bloody
choices.approach: No throws. Make the board rewrite your price in real time.

choices.label: Throw two — steal the cage
choices.approach: Sell a limp. Buy a purse. Survive the house noticing.

frames.title: Odds Board: Three as One: Loud Path
frames.body: Clean is a fairy tale. A chain-lord lieutenant eats fairy tales for breakfast and fighters for lunch.

frames.title: Odds Board: Three as One: Quiet Path
frames.body: You throw round two. Cage man smiles like he invented betrayal — because he did, twice before lunch.

choices.label: Cash the purse and exit
choices.approach: Heavy coin. Broken tooth souvenir. Leave before the main card smells blood money.

choices.label: Rob the cage mid-limp
choices.approach: Quiet throw becomes loud theft. Lieutenant objects with a title and a hammer.

frames.title: Odds Board: Three as One: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Purse, limp, and lieutenant collide. The crowd chants a callsign you never gave them.

frames.title: Odds Board: Three as One: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Purse heavy. Tooth lighter. Odds board still wrong about the dog — fix that later with teeth. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing
frames.body: Spirefall Fields: a cracked VR booth still selling tickets to your past. On the screen — three tables, wipe lights, a handler's voice saying your unit like a product code.

frames.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing: The Ask
frames.body: Smash the booth, listen with the dog filtering, or reverse the feed and hunt the handler's echo.

choices.label: Smash the booth mid-brief
choices.approach: End the product demo. Fight the alpha that guards the archive.

choices.label: Listen through the dog
choices.approach: Let the Rememberer filter the wipe-noise. Steal one clean sentence.

frames.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing: Loud Path
frames.body: Glass and sparks. A shadow-pack alpha steps from the static — archive watchdog with too many teeth.

frames.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing: Quiet Path
frames.body: The dog hears clean: a door that shouldn't exist, a name the handler feared, a choice one brother maybe made.

choices.label: Keep the dog-clean chip
choices.approach: Only he hears it without bleeding. Trust that. Fear that.

choices.label: Reverse the feed on them
choices.approach: Turn the briefing into a beacon for the alpha — then ambush the ambush.

frames.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Feed reverses. Alpha arrives early, mid-download of your outline. Editing gets physical.

frames.title: Booth That Plays Your Briefing: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Briefing chip only the dog hears clean. You sleep worse. You know more. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Loot While the Towers Burn
frames.body: Spirefall Fields under ash snow. Warehouses cough chrome and fire. Scavs sprint like it's Black Friday for the damned.

frames.title: Loot While the Towers Burn: The Ask
frames.body: Raid a Helix crate loud, ghost a side door, or tip scavs into a Dominion leftover nest and loot the survivors.

choices.label: Kick the warehouse door
choices.approach: Chrome and smoke. First pack to the crate owns the ash.

choices.label: Slip the loading dock
choices.approach: Side door. Quiet haul. Leave before the righteous fire gets clever.

frames.title: Loot While the Towers Burn: Loud Path
frames.body: Door yields. A mountain-hammer leftover — siege muscle without a siege — decides the crate is still Dominion property.

frames.title: Loot While the Towers Burn: Quiet Path
frames.body: Dock opens on half-melted stims and wire singing like live nerves. Somewhere a freehold choir is burning papers with live Helix meat.

choices.label: Haul the half-melted crate
choices.approach: Stims and wire. Heavy. Hot. Worth the burns.

choices.label: Collapse the aisle on pursuers
choices.approach: Quiet haul becomes loud architecture. Hammer objects mid-bury.

frames.title: Loot While the Towers Burn: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Aisle falls. Hammer doesn't. Ash tastes like victory and freon.

frames.title: Loot While the Towers Burn: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Half-melted Helix crate: stims, wire, and the smell of a tower learning humility. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather
frames.body: Ash Horizon: rain like cigarette ash. Cultists kneel in a circle, palms up, chanting for a dragon of welded chrome to burn SKUs off living skin.

frames.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather: The Ask
frames.body: Disrupt the prayer, steal the bead stash, or offer a fake barcode and see what answers from the cloud.

choices.label: Break the kneeling circle
choices.approach: Kick the prayer apart. Meet what they summoned — or what pretends.

choices.label: Lift the ash-prayer beads
choices.approach: Steal warmth that predicts dragon weather. Leave before the sky notices.

frames.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather: Loud Path
frames.body: Circle breaks. A nest-mother — spirit-beast fat on ash and worship — drops from the weather like an unpaid miracle.

frames.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather: Quiet Path
frames.body: Bead warms in your fist a breath before the ash thickens. Useful. Blasphemous. Perfect.

choices.label: Keep the warming bead
choices.approach: Early warning for dragon weather. Or early warning you're bait.

choices.label: Fake a barcode offering
choices.approach: Feed the cult a lie. When the sky answers wrong, fight the answer.

frames.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Sky answers with teeth. Nest-mother was always the subscription fee.

frames.title: Prayer Under Dragon Weather: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Ash-prayer bead warms before the real weather. Kneel or run — same forecast. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory
frames.body: Spirefall freehold bonfire: SKU papers curl into black snow. In a cage beside the flames — a Helix clerk still wearing a smile-chip. The crowd wants theater.

frames.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory: The Ask
frames.body: Free the clerk, feed the cage to the fire, or steal the paper ash before someone recognizes your callsign in the smoke.

choices.label: Decide with chrome
choices.approach: Free or burn — pick. Survive the bone-drum captain running security.

choices.label: Steal the callsign ash
choices.approach: Pocket the smell of who you were. Leave the crowd their moral rot.

frames.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory: Loud Path
frames.body: Choice made. A bone-drum captain — pit priest with a war drum — objects to unpaid entertainment tax.

frames.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory: Quiet Path
frames.body: Ash in a vial smells like your first callsign. The dog sneezes. Your brothers go quiet.

choices.label: Walk with the ash vial
choices.approach: Memory you can smell. Guilt you can cork. For now.

choices.label: Flip the cage on the captain
choices.approach: Turn the spectacle into a riot. Rob the drum while it burns.

frames.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Cage opens. Crowd fractures. Captain keeps time with a club instead of a drum.

frames.title: Bonfire of Live Inventory: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Burnt ash that smells like a name you might have chosen. Don't snort it. Don't sell it. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You
frames.body: Westwind Freeholds night market: a man in a cage swears he sat in the wipe room. He smiles like someone who wants to be killed by the right people.

frames.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You: The Ask
frames.body: Bid for him, bust the auction, or make him prove the wipe on a dead chip before coin changes hands.

choices.label: Bust the auction block
choices.approach: Free or finish him — but first kill the berserker running security.

choices.label: Buy the confession quiet
choices.approach: Pay. Extract. Decide later if mercy is a strategy.

frames.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You: Loud Path
frames.body: Block breaks. A warcamp berserker — freehold muscle with Dominion scars — makes the night a pit.

frames.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You: Quiet Path
frames.body: Coin buys a ring and a sentence: which brother may have volunteered for the wipe. The dog looks at that brother too long.

choices.label: Take the soft-lock ring
choices.approach: One Helix door gets polite. The sentence stays in your pack forever.

choices.label: Make him prove it bleeding
choices.approach: Confession under chrome. Fight whoever sold tickets to the truth.

frames.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Proof gets loud. Berserker was always the auction's closing fee.

frames.title: Auction for the Man Who Wiped You: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Defector ring: one soft lock. One ugly sentence about who said yes in the wipe room. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces
frames.body: Ash Horizon dusk: three silhouettes with your jawlines and better haircuts. They raise chrome like a greeting from a life Helix sold twice.

frames.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces: The Ask
frames.body: Duel them loud, ghost the ridge and snipe, or talk long enough to steal their callsign plates.

choices.label: Meet the mirrors with steel
choices.approach: No speeches. Kill the copies. Keep the plates.

choices.label: Steal their callsign plates
choices.approach: Talk like brothers. Lift identity. Vanish before the duel starts.

frames.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces: Loud Path
frames.body: Mirrors charge. A chain-lord lieutenant leads them — title stolen, face almost yours, manners worse.

frames.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces: Quiet Path
frames.body: Plates lift clean. One is scratched mid-name — like someone started becoming you and quit.

choices.label: Wear the scratched plate
choices.approach: Identity as armor. Identity as bait. Same metal.

choices.label: Turn the duel into an ambush
choices.approach: Quiet theft ends. Loud geometry begins. Lieutenant hates geometry.

frames.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: They notice the missing plates. The fight becomes a product recall with siblings.

frames.title: Rival Cell, Same Faces: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Rival callsign plate, scratched mid-fight. Proof Helix mass-produced your silhouette. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Director Vale's Private Blood
frames.body: Undervault sublevel: velvet rope, ozone, and a pit where Helix directors bet on meat that used to have callsigns. Vale's seal glows on the door like a dare.

frames.title: Director Vale's Private Blood: The Ask
frames.body: Crash the pit as fighters, forge guest tokens, or blackmail a director with a stolen briefing chip.

choices.label: Crash as uninvited meat
choices.approach: Kick the velvet. Enter the pit. Make Vale watch.

choices.label: Forge Vale's guest token
choices.approach: Walk in smiling. Steal a real seal. Exit before the alpha notices.

frames.title: Director Vale's Private Blood: Loud Path
frames.body: Velvet tears. A shadow-pack alpha — Vale's favorite closer — drops into the sand like a product demo.

frames.title: Director Vale's Private Blood: Quiet Path
frames.body: Token forges clean. For twelve steps you are a guest. Then a director recognizes a face from a Pale file.

choices.label: Keep Vale's seal token
choices.approach: Invite-only just got a plus-three it didn't approve.

choices.label: Blackmail mid-toast
choices.approach: Threaten a director with Pale truth. Survive the alpha that toast summons.

frames.title: Director Vale's Private Blood: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Toast becomes a scream. Alpha was always the party favor.

frames.title: Director Vale's Private Blood: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Private pit token stamped with Vale's seal. Crash the guest list again when the Spire starts bleeding. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Three Names Under Frost
frames.body: Ash Horizon standing stone wrapped in fiber-vine. A spirit of static and old snowfall holds a slate: three names under frost. The dog sits. Waiting.

frames.title: Three Names Under Frost: The Ask
frames.body: Speak them loud, copy them quiet without voice, or smash the slate and fight what the names were feeding.

choices.label: Speak the three names
choices.approach: Risk the ping. Claim the selves. Kill what arrives hungry.

choices.label: Copy without speaking
choices.approach: Steal frost-names mute. Let silence be the only prayer.

frames.title: Three Names Under Frost: Loud Path
frames.body: Names leave your mouth like gunshots. A mountain-hammer — name-debt collector — arrives to invoice the noise.

frames.title: Three Names Under Frost: Quiet Path
frames.body: Frost copies to a fragment. Names itch unread. Hunters stay blind. For now.

choices.label: Pocket the frost fragment
choices.approach: Three names. Zero spoken. Infinite ways to regret later.

choices.label: Smash the slate mid-deal
choices.approach: Refuse the spirit's interest rate. Fight the debt in the flesh.

frames.title: Three Names Under Frost: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Slate breaks. Names scream without mouths. Hammer arrives to collect the noise tax.

frames.title: Three Names Under Frost: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Slate fragment under frost: three names that might make you real — or make you hunted. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon
frames.body: Spirefall coolant fog thick enough to chew. Scavs point at a silhouette in the steam: wings like scrapyard angels, breath like a forge having a seizure.

frames.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon: The Ask
frames.body: Hunt the silhouette loud, photograph the nest quiet, or bait Helix into bombing their own rumor.

choices.label: Hunt the scrapyard angel
choices.approach: Walk into fog. Meet nest-mother or myth. Bring back proof or bones.

choices.label: Lift a scale from the nest
choices.approach: No heroics. Steal a tick. Sell a legend.

frames.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon: Loud Path
frames.body: Fog becomes teeth. Nest-mother — whether dragon or spirit wearing scrap — decides rumor needs a body count.

frames.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon: Quiet Path
frames.body: Scale ticks in your palm like a Geiger counting sins. Far off, something huge shifts and almost notices.

choices.label: Sell the ticking scale
choices.approach: Rumor becomes currency. Currency becomes a target on your back.

choices.label: Bait Helix into the fog
choices.approach: Ping a false nest. Ambush the recall. Keep the real scale.

frames.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Recall and nest-mother arrive together. Fog hosts a three-way argument with plasma and wings.

frames.title: Prove the Chrome Dragon: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Welded chrome scale ticks when dragons — or Dominion lies about dragons — get close. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road
frames.body: Last den before Ash Horizon proper. Neon sign half-dead: REMEMBER / FORGET / PAY. The dealer already knows which brother will flinch.

frames.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road: The Ask
frames.body: Take the hit and dream the wipe, smash the den for sober coin, or make the dealer name who still ships PALE-LITE west.

choices.label: Smash the den for sober coin
choices.approach: Break the neon. Rob the till. Kill the bouncer who is also the best customer.

choices.label: Take the hit — dream the wipe
choices.approach: Swallow. See the tables. Wake knowing more than is safe.

frames.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road: Loud Path
frames.body: Neon dies. A bone-drum captain — bouncer, addict, tempo priest — multitasks by trying to end you on beat.

frames.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road: Quiet Path
frames.body: Hit lands. Dream: wipe room, three tables, one dog barking at a door that should not exist — and one brother already signing.

choices.label: Pocket the final ampule
choices.approach: Clarity or relapse at dawn. The road west does not care which.

choices.label: Extract the Pale supply chain
choices.approach: Dealer names a handler. Handler's friends object with drums and chrome.

frames.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road: Quiet Breaks
frames.body: Confession includes an address. Captain objects to unpaid logistics. Dawn gets delayed by violence.

frames.title: Last Ampule Before the Ash Road: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Final ampule. Clarity or relapse. East burns behind you. West waits without mercy. Side quest complete — return to the march.
